name: github_list_org_custom_property_values
description: GET /orgs/{org}/properties/values — list org repos with custom property name/value pairs. Optional repository_query (search qualifiers), page/per_page (max 100), or all_pages + max_pages. Org members may read. HTTP 200. See GitHub REST org custom properties.

repository_query.description: Optional filter: same qualifiers as GitHub repository search (GitHub repository_query).

all_pages.description: Follow Link next until exhausted or max_pages.
